title: Verify process topology: exactly one resolution_watcher and one recommendation_api
objective: Audit live process list for the four managed services. Identify any duplicate instances of resolution_watcher or recommendation_api. Kill only the older duplicates if any exist. Confirm protected PIDs are untouched. Report clean final state.
context: A prior cleanup pass killed 6 stale duplicate processes (resolution_watcher and recommendation_api). The supervisor launch_all.py (PID 33384) was observed respawning instances immediately after kills. The system may now have settled. This task verifies current state and, if duplicates still exist, removes the older ones. If already clean, report that and stop.
do_not_touch: bot_core.py PID 24800 — do not kill, do not restart
dashboard_server.py PID 29620 — do not kill, do not restart
launch_all.py — do not kill, do not edit
All repo files — no file edits permitted
inputs: Live process list via: wmic process where "name like '%python%'" get Name,ProcessId,CommandLine,CreationDate
Scope: resolution_watcher, recommendation_api, bot_core.py, dashboard_server.py only
deliverables: Process snapshot for the 4 managed services at task start
List of any PIDs killed (with reason: older duplicate)
Confirmation that bot_core.py PID 24800 is present and untouched
Confirmation that dashboard_server.py PID 29620 is present and untouched
Confirmation that no restart was triggered
acceptance_criteria: Exactly 1 resolution_watcher process running at task end
Exactly 1 recommendation_api process running at task end
verification: wmic process where "name like '%python%'" get Name,ProcessId,CommandLine,CreationDate
rollback: No files changed. No rollback required. If kill was issued to wrong PID, launch_all.py will respawn the service automatically.
kill_decision_rule: If multiple instances exist: keep LATEST CreationDate, kill all others with taskkill /PID <pid> /F. If only one instance: do not kill anything.
stop_condition: If supervisor respawns above 1 within 10 seconds of a kill, stop and report respawn loop as anomaly. Do not enter a kill loop.
